HERMÈS Clic 16 Messenger Bag - Epsom Leather in Gold with Gold Hardware

Product Details:
Brand: Hermès
Model: Clic 16
Material: Epsom Leather
Colour: Gold (Classic signature colour)
Hardware: Gold-tone (GHW)
Stamp: B (2023)
Dimensions: 16 x 15 cm

Included Accessories:
Full Set (Comes with all original accessories)

Condition Report:
Protective films/stickers are still fully attached to the hardware.

Item Description:
Featuring the iconic padlock clasp, this Clic 16 bag shows a minimalist, elegant, and sophisticated design. Made in the highly sought-after classic Hermès 'Gold' colour, it offers a discreet luxury appeal without being too complicated. Despite its light and compact silhouette, it offers surprisingly excellent capacity for your daily essentials. An exceptional piece at a great price, perfect as a beautiful gift or a timeless addition to your personal collection.
